speaker_notes: - This should feel like a calm consolidation of the talk.

point_1.value: Agents and agent harnesses are not magic

point_2.value: Building them increasingly looks like assembling Lego blocks

point_3.value: Agents can do any task with the right instructions, tools, and data

point_4.value: Programming them is getting easier, they speak English

point_5.value: Agents can perform functions embedded inside traditional software

point_6.value: Agents can exist outside traditional software products and even in physical environments as universal assistants
